name: Magivor
short_description: Magivor - A vampire survivors game, with a top view, where the player controls a character who automatically deals damage to surrounding enemies, learning and improving his skills with each level up.
detailed_description:
A great magician is out on the hunt against the evil that has enslaved the local lands. Armed with ancient magic and the knowledge he gains from killing monsters, give him more and more skills to overcome all the obstacles in his path.

Magivor - A vampire survivors game, with a top view, where the player controls a character who automatically deals damage to surrounding enemies, learning and improving his skills with each level up.

Game Features:
- Visual style
- Vampire Survivors - like
- Hero Upgrade
